query: /nerdbot query "What do we know about vendor pricing risk?"
expected_behavior: Agent dispatches to the Query workflow based on the explicit '/nerdbot query' invocation
Agent loads references/kb-architecture.md before answering so the response follows the KB layer contract
Agent reads wiki and indexes first, using raw only to verify citations or confirm gaps
Agent answers with note paths, wikilinks, provenance references, and an explicit confidence level
Agent keeps query read-only by default and recommends enrich, ingest, or derive when the KB has a partial answer or a gap
